text: The person with the most Linear issues in the 'in_progress' state is dave, who has 2 such issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def in-progress-issues (filter #(= (:state %) "in_progress") (linear_issues)))

(def by-assignee (group-by :assignee in-progress-issues))

(def counts (map (fn [[assignee issues]] [assignee (count issues)]) by-assignee))

(def sorted-counts (sort-by second > counts))

(def top-assignee (first sorted-counts))

[(:assignee (first top-assignee)) (second top-assignee)]"}

{"code":"(def in-progress-issues (filter #(= (:state %) "in_progress") (linear_issues)))

(def by-assignee (group-by :assignee in-progress-issues))

(def counts (map (fn [[assignee issues]] [assignee (count issues)]) by-assignee))

(def sorted-counts (sort-by second > counts))

(def top-assignee (first sorted-counts))

;; Extract the assignee and count directly
[top-assignee]"}
